title: gladiolus alatus var. speciosus
intro: Gladiolus alatus var. speciosus, also known as the Sword Lily, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Iridaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus alatus var. speciosus include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and easing respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
